# rivalDrop

rivalDrop sells weekly competitor moves for Shopify operators.

## Core offer

Every Monday, rivalDrop tells a Shopify team:

- what competitors changed
- what customers noticed
- what move is worth making next

The first wedge is ultralight backpacking and outdoor gear brands on Shopify. The product tracks public surfaces: product launches, price changes, restocks, sold-out pages, reviews, forums, SEO gaps, and visible ad or messaging shifts.

## Pricing

- rivalDrop monthly: $149 per month.
- Starts with three rivals.
- First-week guarantee: if week one cannot capture useful signal, the customer does not pay for week two.

## Important pages

- Home: https://rivaldrop.com/
- Shopify use case: https://rivaldrop.com/shopify.html
- Sample brief: https://rivaldrop.com/sample/
- How it works: https://rivaldrop.com/services.html
- Alternatives: https://rivaldrop.com/alternatives.html
- Onboard: https://rivaldrop.com/onboard.html

## Boundaries

- Public data only.
- No bypassing logins or private accounts.
- Client watchlists are not resold as a data product.
- The brief gives evidence and suggested moves, not magic certainty.

## Contact

Email: hello@rivaldrop.com
